description: Data catalogue for SUEWS MCP search tool. Describes sample datasets, forcing requirements, surface parameter groups, and external data sources.

sample_datasets.name: King's College London (KCL)
sample_datasets.description: Urban flux tower site in central London. Benchmark 1a from Ward et al. (2016).
sample_datasets.access: Bundled with supy. Load via SUEWSSimulation.from_sample_data() or execute() with empty config.

forcing_variables.description: Meteorological forcing time series aligned with the model timestep. All columns must be present; use -999 for missing values that the model can compute internally.
forcing_variables.file_format: Space-separated text with header row. Columns: iy id it imin <variables>.

required_variables.name: kdown
required_variables.notes: Primary radiation driver. Must be observed or from reanalysis.

required_variables.name: Tair
required_variables.notes: Used throughout energy balance and phenology.

required_variables.name: pres
required_variables.notes: Used for density and psychrometric calculations.

required_variables.name: rain
required_variables.notes: Accumulated over timestep. Drives hydrology and wet/dry surface state.

optional_variables.name: ldown
optional_variables.notes: If missing (-999), estimated internally from cloud fraction or temperature.

optional_variables.name: fcld
optional_variables.notes: Used to estimate ldown if ldown is missing. If both missing, estimated from kdown.

optional_variables.name: snow
optional_variables.notes: If missing, estimated from Tair and rain.

optional_variables.name: wdir
optional_variables.notes: Used for source area calculations. Not needed for basic runs.

optional_variables.name: xsmd
optional_variables.description: External soil moisture deficit or measurement
optional_variables.notes: Only needed if soil moisture method uses external observations.

optional_variables.name: lai
optional_variables.notes: Only needed if LAI method uses external observations. Usually modelled internally.

optional_variables.name: kdiff
optional_variables.notes: Used by SPARTACUS radiation scheme. Estimated from kdown if missing.

optional_variables.name: kdir
optional_variables.notes: Used by SPARTACUS radiation scheme. Estimated from kdown if missing.

optional_variables.name: Wuh
optional_variables.notes: Only needed if external water supply data is available.

optional_variables.name: qn
optional_variables.notes: Only required if netradiationmethod=0 (use observed). Usually modelled.

optional_variables.name: qh
optional_variables.notes: Reference only. Not used as model input.

optional_variables.name: qe
optional_variables.notes: Reference only. Not used as model input.

optional_variables.name: qs
optional_variables.notes: Reference only. Not used as model input.

optional_variables.name: qf
optional_variables.notes: Only required if emissionsmethod=0 (use observed QF).

minimum_forcing_set.description: The minimum set of variables needed for a basic SUEWS run. All other columns can be -999.
minimum_forcing_set.notes: This is sufficient when the model estimates ldown internally (from Tair/fcld/kdown) and uses modelled LAI, soil moisture, and radiation partitioning.

surface_parameter_groups.description: SUEWS requires parameters for each land cover type present at the site. Fractions must be specified for all 7 types (can be 0).

land_cover_types.name: paved
land_cover_types.description: Impervious paved surfaces (roads, car parks, pavements)

land_cover_types.name: deciduous_tree
land_cover_types.description: Deciduous trees with seasonal leaf cycle

site_geometry.notes: Use search(type_name='suews-site', detail_level='schema') for full field listing.

external_data_sources.name: ERA5 Reanalysis
external_data_sources.description: Global atmospheric reanalysis. Primary source for generating SUEWS forcing data at any location worldwide.
external_data_sources.supy_integration: supy.util.gen_forcing_era5(lat, lon, start, end, dir_save) downloads and formats automatically. Requires CDS API credentials (~/.cdsapirc).
external_data_sources.typical_download_time: ~26 seconds for 30 years of point data via timeseries API
external_data_sources.notes: Includes vertical extrapolation for temperature (lapse rate), wind (log profile), and pressure (barometric formula).

external_data_sources.name: EPW Weather Files
external_data_sources.description: EnergyPlus Weather format files containing typical meteorological year data. Widely available for cities worldwide.
external_data_sources.supy_integration: supy.util.read_epw(path_epw) reads and converts to SUEWS format. Optional height correction for wind speed.
external_data_sources.notes: TMY data represents typical conditions, not specific years. Good for design studies, not event analysis.

external_data_sources.name: WUDAPT / Local Climate Zones
external_data_sources.provider: World Urban Database and Portal Tools
external_data_sources.description: Global urban morphology classification based on Local Climate Zone (LCZ) framework. Maps cities into standardised urban form categories.
external_data_sources.supy_integration: Via UMEP plugin LCZ Converter. Converts LCZ classification to SUEWS site parameters.
external_data_sources.notes: Provides reasonable first-estimate parameters. Site-specific measurements are always more accurate.

external_data_sources.name: UMEP Pre-processors
external_data_sources.description: QGIS plugin suite for preparing SUEWS inputs from geospatial data.
tools: Morphometric Calculator: building height, plan area fraction, frontal area from DSM
Land Cover Reclassifier: classify raster into SUEWS land cover types
Land Cover Fraction: compute surface type fractions from classified raster
Source Area Model: flux footprint analysis
external_data_sources.notes: DSM typically from LiDAR or national elevation datasets. Building footprints from OpenStreetMap or national cadastre.
